title: In cxxrtl case item expressions are compared in an unexpected order

features.name: case statement with ordered multi-bit constant patterns
features.description: Code should include a case statement with multiple ordered constant bit-pattern case items and a default branch, where the select expression is a multi-bit signal

features.name: case statement with overlapping casex patterns
features.description: Code should include a casex statement with overlapping wildcard patterns where item order determines which assignment wins, as the Verilog standard mandates linear search through items in order
